summary: Phase 1 testing of Chronos new navigation pages (Crónicas, Legados, Documentos, Épocas, Épocas/:nombre, Relato/:id), new historic-icon set, and new endpoints (GET /api/epocas, GET /api/epocas/:nombre/relatos, GET /api/relatos/:id, GET/POST /api/comentarios with replies). Backend: 29 passed, 2 skipped (pre-existing alex seed lookup). Frontend Playwright: 25/25 passed across navigation, layout integrity (archive-sidebar correctly hidden on new pages), epoch grid, relato detail (composer + reply chain end-to-end), and historic icon usage.
critical_code_review_comments: server.js now ~916 lines — still acceptable but approaching the recommended 1000-line split threshold. Suggest extracting routes/comentarios.js, routes/epocas.js, routes/relatos.js after Phase 2 lands.

GET /api/comentarios/:publicacionId uses N+1 query pattern (one query per parent comment to fetch respuestas). Fine for now but consider single aggregation with $lookup when a relato exceeds ~50 comments.

POST /api/comentarios does not validate that publicacion_id is a valid ObjectId nor that parent_id (if provided) actually belongs to the same publicacion. Low risk because frontend controls it, but a malicious client could nest a reply on an unrelated post or pass a non-ObjectId. Add a regex check + cross-publicacion validation for parent_id.

GET /api/epocas/:nombre/relatos does NOT URL-decode :nombre explicitly — relies on Express default decoding which works (verified with 'Roma imperial' → 'Roma%20imperial'). No action needed but worth documenting.

Relato detail (frontend) — when usuario_id is the current user, deletion uses TabletDaggerIcon and confirms before delete. Confirm browser native confirm() is acceptable; consider replacing with the existing shadcn AlertDialog for consistent dark-archive aesthetic.
On /relato/:id, drop-cap renders correctly. Verify it does NOT break in Spanish words starting with accented characters (visual spot-check looked fine with 'Imperio').

success_rate.backend: 100% (29/29 executed; 2 skipped due to seed data, not bug)

seed_data_creation: Test created comments tagged with TEST_parent_comment Phase1 testing on the first feed relato. Also added one normal-looking comment 'Comentario de prueba automatizado' and a reply 'Respuesta de prueba' from Keilin (visible in screenshot). Not cleaned up — consider clearing via Mongo if persistent test data is undesired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 fully verified. New routes confirmed working: /cronicas, /legados, /documentos, /epocas, /epocas/:nombre, /relato/:id. PageShell correctly omits ArchiveSidebar (efemerides) on all new pages — only home (/) retains it. Verified testids: nav-crónicas, nav-legados, nav-documentos, filter-recientes, filter-populares, user-card-{id}, follow-btn-{id}, rail-epocas, rail-explorar, epoca-card-{nombre}, comment-composer-input, comment-submit-btn, reply-btn-{id}, reply-input-{id}, reply-submit-{id}. Historic icons (CoinLaurelIcon/ParchmentIcon/DoveScrollIcon/ChestIcon) render correctly in SocialPost actions and relato detail page. Comments endpoint returns nested respuestas[] correctly with populated usuario_id. Phase 2 (notifications + edit profile) and Phase 3 (efemerides calendar) NOT tested per request.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
